bird.name: 剪嘴鸥
bird.summary: 剪嘴鸥（学名：Rynchops albicollis），是鸻形目鸥科的一种鸟类。其种加词“albicollis”意为“白色的脖子”。 特征 剪嘴鸥体重约164克，翼长约371.8毫米，嘴峰长约84.9毫米，喙宽度约6.3毫米，喙厚度约21.9毫米，跗蹠长约26毫米，尾长约108…

locations.name: 克什米尔
locations.summary: 克什米尔（印地語：कश्मीर、烏爾都語：کشمیر）是介於青藏高原西端與南亚次大陆最北端交接的一个地区。19世纪中期之前，“克什米尔”一词仅指代喜马拉雅山脉和比尔本贾尔岭之间的河谷地，而今日則泛指由印度控制的查谟和克什米尔（细分为查谟、…

locations.name: 老挝
locations.summary: 老挝人民民主共和国（寮語：ສາທາລະນະລັດ ປະຊາທິປະໄຕ ປະຊາຊົນລາວ，简写：ສປປ ລາວ），通稱寮國（寮語：ລາວ），是位于東南亞中南半岛的社会主义国家，首都及最大城市为万象，通行寮语，面积23.68万平方公里，…

locations.name: 柬埔寨
locations.summary: 柬埔寨王國（高棉語：ព្រះរាជាណាចក្រកម្ពុជា，羅馬化：Preăh Réachéanachâk Kâmpŭchéa），通稱柬埔寨（高棉語：កម្ពុជា，羅馬化：Kâmpŭchéa），是位於東南亞中南半島的君主立憲制國家，…

locations.name: 越南
locations.summary: 越南社会主义共和国（越南語：Cộng hòa Xã hội chủ nghĩa Việt Nam／共和社會主義越南，），通称越南（越南語：Việt Nam），是位于东南亚中南半岛东端的社会主义国家。北接中国，西邻柬埔寨与老挝，全国人口约逾…

relations.subject: 剪嘴鸥
relations.evidence: It is still found in parts of Pakistan in the Indus river system of Kashmir and northern and central India along the Ganges, Bangladesh and Burma and formerly occurred in Laos, Cambodia and Vietnam

relations.subject: 剪嘴鸥
relations.evidence: They are mainly found in rivers or estuaries
relations.object_summary: 海湾、泻湖、盐沼与河口组成的复合湿地。

relations.subject: 剪嘴鸥
relations.evidence: They are mainly found in rivers or estuaries
relations.object_summary: 淡水与海水交汇形成的高生产力边缘生态系统。

relations.subject: 剪嘴鸥
relations.evidence: |year=2015| title= Breeding status of Indian Skimmer Rynchops albicollis in the National Chambal Sanctuary, India.| journal= Indian Birds |volume=10 |issue=2|page=53|url=http://www.indianbirds.in/pdfs/IB_10_2_Das_Skimmer.pdf}} They are more widespread in winter and are found in coastal estuaries of western and eastern India as far south as Karwar on the western coast and; Chennai and Pondicherry on the eastern coast exist.{{cite journal|title=Indian Skimmer Rynchops albicollis: a recent record from Tamil Nadu|journal=BirdingASIA |volume=13 |year=2010|page=98|url=http://orientalbirdclub.org/wp-content/uploads/2012/11/Vikas-Caught.pdf|author1=Madhav, Vikas |author2=D
relations.object_summary: 海湾、泻湖、盐沼与河口组成的复合湿地。

relations.subject: 剪嘴鸥
relations.evidence: The decreasing population has led it to being classed as Endangered by the IUCN. It is threatened by habitat loss and degradation, pollution and disturbance by humans
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 剪嘴鸥
